papers.title: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it
papers.title_zh: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it
papers.tldr_zh: SusHi Tech 2026 is zeroing in on four technology domains res
papers.cover_zh: SusHi Tech 2026 is zeroing in on four technology domains res
papers.abstract_zh: SusHi Tech 2026 is zeroing in on four technology domains reshaping society: AI, Robotics, Resilience, and Entertainment. Expect live demos of humanoid robots, sessions on autonomous driving's software revolution, deep dives into cyber defense and climate tech, and candid conversations about how AI is rewriting the global music and anime industries.
